sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88189" key="proorme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προορμ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n88189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sail from an anchorage,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.122</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
